fields.title: DRY: Extract shared message injection utilities
fields.description: sandbox-change.ts and agent-awareness/injection.ts duplicate: MessageLike type, asContentArray function, and the inject-into-last-user-message pattern. Extract into shared/message-injection.ts.
fields.close_reason: Extracted MessageLike, asContentArray, isTextContent, prependToLastUserMessage into shared/message-injection.ts. Rewrote sandbox-change.ts and agent-awareness/injection.ts to use shared utilities.
